docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $514.00 BE RELEASED TO SUMMER SALIBA ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT DANA CARTER AKA IRIE BENSON. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
